recovery: Import a trusted-time receipt admitted under the active policy.
Set CPCF_TOKEN to a short-lived OIDC access token.
Re-export the bundle from its authoritative generation.
Narrow the signed action registry without dropping safety filters.
Verify CPCF_API_URL, OIDC authority, and service readiness.
Validate the object against the installed schema digest.
Use cpcf legacy inspect only for a registered read-only command.
Reinstall the wheel under a supported CPython version.
Reconstruct source pointers and obtain the required independent approval.
Obtain role-separated signatures from distinct admitted principals.
Run cpcf schema list --json and select a registered kind.
Inspect legacy content read-only and migrate by copy.
